name: Cash Giant Of Eastpointe
description_short: Cash Giant Of Eastpointe is a cash access point located in Eastpointe, MI offering ATM services and likely check cashing or currency exchange based on its name and emergency-cash positioning.
description_long: Cash Giant Of Eastpointe operates as a cash access and financial services location in Eastpointe, Michigan. The business is situated at 14871 8 Mile Rd and maintains regular operating hours throughout the week. Based on the company name and current categorization, the business appears to position itself within the emergency financial services space, though the available website data is limited to location and contact information via Waze. The company maintains a physical storefront with phone contact available at (586) 871-2069. Operating hours suggest a business designed for working professionals and general public access, with extended weekday hours (10 AM–7 PM Monday–Friday) and shorter weekend hours (11 AM–5 PM Sunday, 10 AM–5 PM Saturday). The primary challenge in assessing this company is the lack of detailed service descriptions on the indexed website content, which consists solely of Waze navigation data. Without access to a dedicated company website, independent reviews, or service listings, it is difficult to identify specific products offered beyond what the name suggests. The business appears to be a local, brick-and-mortar operation rather than an online-only lender. For consumers seeking emergency cash, the physical location may provide same-day access to funds, though specific loan terms, APR rates, and eligibility requirements are not documented in available sources. The recategorization from 'emergency-cash' to 'atm' reflects the likelihood that this is primarily a cash access or check-cashing point rather than a short-term lender.
